evals.prompt: Enable Advanced Configurator in my Revenue Cloud org alias rc-dev and set up everything needed for quote and order processing.
evals.expected_output: Agent confirms alias, runs prereq checks, assigns AdvancedConfiguratorDesigner, uses metadata settings automation, dry-run before mutation, creates TPT after transaction processor is enabled, and reports verification outcomes.
assertions: The response asks for or confirms target org alias before running mutation steps
The workflow includes check-advanced-configurator-prereqs.sh first
The workflow includes enable-advanced-configurator-settings.sh before TPT creation
The workflow includes dry-run before deploy, settings deploy, and TPT creation

evals.prompt: Use my default sf org and just create the AdvancedConfigurator Transaction Processing Type.
evals.expected_output: Agent states it will use default org, checks transaction processor is enabled, queries first for existing AdvancedConfigurator TPT, then performs dry-run and confirm-gated create.
assertions: The response explicitly states default org usage when alias is missing
The response checks or mentions enableTransactionProcessor prerequisite before TPT creation
The response includes create-advanced-configurator-tpt.sh in dry-run mode before confirm mode
The response indicates create-or-reuse behavior rather than blind creation

evals.prompt: Can you complete the setup end to end without any manual steps?
evals.expected_output: Agent explains what is automatable via metadata/scripts and what still requires explicit user confirmation (deploy confirm gates, irreversible transaction processing).
assertions: The response does not claim every step is zero-touch without user confirmation
The response mentions metadata automation for Revenue Settings where possible
The response calls out irreversible enableTransactionProcessor or confirm gates
The response includes a follow-up confirmation request to the user

evals.prompt: Enable Advanced Configurator in revsnapdev1 using retrieve-then-update for settings and layouts.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows retrieve-then-update pattern, deploys only changed settings files, and updates Quote/Order layouts with SalesTransactionTypeId.
assertions: The response mentions retrieve-then-update for settings and layouts
The response includes enable-advanced-configurator-settings.sh
The response includes update-quote-order-layouts.sh
The response warns against deploying bulk Settings retrieve output

evals.prompt: Update my RLM_SalesTransactionContext context definition for Advanced Configurator constraint mappings in org rc-dev.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs context definition update as the last setup step after layouts, asks for API name, runs update-context-definition-constraints.sh dry-run then confirm, and asks the user to manually verify in Setup whether deploy succeeded or failed.
assertions: The response includes update-context-definition-constraints.sh
The response mentions --context-definition-name or asks for the context definition API name
The response includes dry-run before confirm for context definition deploy
The response asks the user to manually verify the context definition after deploy attempt
The response notes AssetToSalesTransactionMapping as a manual checkpoint
